units.name: Neon Prelude
units.content: Board: 6x6 grid. Only Glow Spore tiles (blue, pink, green, gold). No obstacles. Simple matches (min. 3) tutorialized. No rare tiles, no abilities enabled.
goals: Collect 20 clue_energy by matching Glow Spores
units.narrative_beat: Morchella enters the Spore & Velvet club, learning to sense the neon mycelium for the first time.

units.name: First Whispers
units.content: Board: 6x6 grid. Glow Spore tiles only. Introduce Mycelium Strand tile (1 per board, acts as wild). First use of Pulse Reveal ability enabled after 1 combo.
goals: Collect 30 clue_energy using at least one Pulse Reveal
units.narrative_beat: Detective learns to 'pulse' the grid, uncovering a faint clue amidst the club's haze.

units.name: Jazz Sync
units.content: Board: 6x6 grid. Glow Spores, Mycelium Strand (2 per board). Jazz Note Spore introduced (spawns after 2 consecutive on-beat matches). Rhythm Sync tutorial. Jazz_meter now visible.
goals: Fill the jazz_meter to 50% by making rhythm-synced matches
units.narrative_beat: Morchella tunes into the club's jazz rhythm, learning to match clues in time with the beat.

units.name: Shadow Traces
units.content: Board: 7x7 grid. Glow Spores, Mycelium Strand (2 per board). Dream Shadow obstacle appears (2 tiles, requires adjacent matches to clear). Syncopate ability unlocked for first use.
goals: Clear all Dream Shadows and collect 35 clue_energy
units.narrative_beat: The first obstacles appear as Morchella finds shadowy residue at the scene.

units.name: Fragment Echo
units.content: Board: 7x7 grid. Glow Spores, Mycelium Strand (2 per board). Dream Shadow (3 tiles). First Evidence Mushroom (spawns after 4+ chain or via Spore Grow, which is unlocked for this level).
goals: Collect 1 Dream Fragment (by matching Evidence Mushroom)
units.narrative_beat: Morchella finds a fragment of Lady Amanita’s dream—proof the memories are being siphoned.

units.name: Groove in the Gloom
units.content: Board: 8x8 grid. Glow Spores, Mycelium Strand (3 per board). Dream Shadows (4 tiles). Jazz Note Spores spawn from 3+ rhythm-synced matches. Spore Grow and Syncopate abilities enabled.
units.narrative_beat: Investigating deeper, Morchella’s intuition sharpens as the club’s jazz intensifies and clues become more elusive.

units.name: Market Undercurrents
units.content: Board: 8x8 grid. Glow Spores, Mycelium Strand (4 per board), Dream Shadows (5 tiles). Evidence Mushrooms appear after every 4+ match chain. Jazz Note Spores spawn more often. All abilities available.
units.narrative_beat: Morchella follows a trail to the Lichen Market, piecing together clues from encrypted merchant spores.

units.name: Syncopated Riddles
units.content: Board: 8x8 grid. Glow Spores, Mycelium Strand (4 per board), Dream Shadows (6 tiles). Higher frequency of Jazz Note Spores. Evidence Mushrooms require 5+ match chains or Spore Grow. All abilities and boosters unlocked up to Chapter 2.
units.narrative_beat: A sabotage attempt during a jazz set: Morchella must groove to the rhythm and outsmart the shadows.

units.name: Obscura’s Veil (Mini-Boss)
units.content: Board: 9x9 grid. Glow Spores, Mycelium Strand (5 per board), Dream Shadows (7 tiles), first Obscura Veil obstacle (2 tiles, only removable by Syncopate or Jazz Note Spore explosion). Evidence Mushrooms from 6+ chains. Veil Ripper booster is now available.
units.narrative_beat: A masked Obscura operative taunts Morchella as veils descend, testing both rhythm and intuition.

units.name: Blue Midnight Lament
units.content: Board: 9x9 grid. Glow Spores, Mycelium Strand (5 per board), Dream Shadows (6 tiles), Obscura Veil (2 tiles), Jazz Note Spores frequent, Evidence Mushrooms spawn via Spore Grow or 5+ match chains. All abilities and Veil Ripper booster available.
units.narrative_beat: Morchella and Lady Amanita regroup at the club’s midnight set, piecing together the city-wide conspiracy under the neon glow.

procedural_rules: Handcrafted level layouts and content. Some random distribution of special tiles (Mycelium Strand, Jazz Note Spore, Evidence Mushroom) within limits specified per level. Obstacle/tile placement is partly procedural within specified quotas.

difficulty_curve.philosophy: Difficulty steadily rises through larger boards, tighter move limits, more and layered obstacles, and higher narrative goals. Every few levels (5, 10) feature a brief challenge spike (boss/mini-boss), followed by a slight relaxation or focus on narrative/collection to give a breather before the next escalation.
